name: Caim
comment: Better and more beautiful than any other. And thus always alone. This is how a fool is born. But one day, all his fragile mind had ever known was tossed into a forgotten abyss. Whether that has turned out for better or worse is anyone's guess. But when the upside-down smile of a certain figure now peers into his eyes, the purity within almost seems to lighten up the skies.

1.name: Double Deal +
1.comment: Instant cooldown to an earth ally's next skill cast (Can't recast)
1.comment_en: Instant cooldown to an earth ally's next skill cast (Can't recast)

buff.detail: Next skill can be recast with no cooldown (Can't be removed)

2.name: Beginning of Joker +
2.comment: Copy an ally's skill (Skill changes to End of Joker upon casting)
2.comment_en: Copy an ally's skill (Skill changes to End of Joker upon casting)

action_ability.name: End of Joker +
action_ability.comment: Various buffs to earth allies (Skill changes to Beginning of Joker upon casting)
action_ability.comment_en: Various buffs to earth allies (Skill changes to Beginning of Joker upon casting)

buff.detail: Next ATK received will be ineffective for a fixed amount
Recover HP each turn. Boost to charge bar if HP is full.
Charge bar is boosted on every turn
Maximum amount of DMG that can be dealt per hit is boosted

3.name: Blank Face
3.comment: Skill effect changes based on the type of skill that is first used by a main ally
3.comment_en: Skill effect changes based on the type of skill that is first used by a main ally

action_ability.name: Spade Trick
action_ability.comment: Attack without using up a turn / Raise caster's Spade Rank by 1 (Boost to ATK based on Spade Rank [Max: 4] / Piercing Sight effect)
action_ability.comment_en: Attack without using up a turn / Raise caster's Spade Rank by 1 (Boost to ATK based on Spade Rank [Max: 4] / Piercing Sight effect)

buff.detail: ATK is boosted based on Spade Rank / Elemental DMG dealt will be treated as superior to the target's element (Can't be removed)

action_ability.name: Heart Trick
action_ability.comment: Restore all allies' HP / Raise caster's Heart Rank by 1 (Boost to healing specs based on Heart Rank [Max: 4] / Drain effect)
action_ability.comment_en: Restore all allies' HP / Raise caster's Heart Rank by 1 (Boost to healing specs based on Heart Rank [Max: 4] / Drain effect)

buff.detail: Healing specs are boosted based on Heart Rank / Normal attack and C.A. DMG dealt is partially absorbed to HP (Can't be removed)

action_ability.name: Diamond Trick
action_ability.comment: 15% boost to all allies' charge bars / Raise caster's Diamond Rank by 1 (Boost to DEF based on Diamond Rank [Max: 4] / Elemental Switch effect)
action_ability.comment_en: 15% boost to all allies' charge bars / Raise caster's Diamond Rank by 1 (Boost to DEF based on Diamond Rank [Max: 4] / Elemental Switch effect)

buff.detail: DEF is boosted based on Diamond Rank / Elemental DMG from foes turns into water DMG (Can't be removed)

action_ability.name: Club Trick
action_ability.comment: Delay effect to all foes / Hit to ATK and DEF (Stackable) / Raise Club Rank by 1 (Boost to caster's debuff success rate based on Club Rank [Max: 4] / Bonus Earth DMG effect)
action_ability.comment_en: Delay effect to all foes / Hit to ATK and DEF (Stackable) / Raise Club Rank by 1 (Boost to caster's debuff success rate based on Club Rank [Max: 4] / Bonus Earth DMG effect)

buff.detail: Debuff success rate is boosted based on Club Rank / Deals bonus earth DMG for one-foe attacks (Can't be removed)

4.name: Secret Hands
4.comment: Skill effect changes based on the card selected (Can only be used after The Fool Upright activates)
4.comment_en: Skill effect changes based on the card selected (Can only be used after The Fool Upright activates)

action_ability.name: Beatdown
action_ability.comment: Earth DMG to all foes / Sharp boost to caster's ATK / Deal triple attacks (Counts as a damage skill when cast)
action_ability.comment_en: Earth DMG to all foes / Sharp boost to caster's ATK / Deal triple attacks (Counts as a damage skill when cast)

action_ability.name: Life Gain
action_ability.comment: Create 1 green potion / Remove 1 debuff from all allies (Counts as a healing skill when cast)
action_ability.comment_en: Create 1 green potion / Remove 1 debuff from all allies (Counts as a healing skill when cast)

action_ability.name: Extra Turn
action_ability.comment: End cooldown for caster's other skills (Counts as a buff skill when cast)
action_ability.comment_en: End cooldown for caster's other skills (Counts as a buff skill when cast)

action_ability.name: Delay Action
action_ability.comment: Battle turn progresses by 2 at end of turn (Counts as a debuff skill when cast)
action_ability.comment_en: Battle turn progresses by 2 at end of turn (Counts as a debuff skill when cast)

1.name: Wild Card
1.comment: Subject to all specialty weapon-, style-, and type-related weapon skills

2.name: The Hanged Man's Charity
2.comment: Remove 1 debuff from earth allies with 12 or more buffs at end of turn

1.name: The Hanged Man Reversed +
1.comment: When all equipped weapons are different: Boost to earth allies' ATK, DEF, and DMG cap / Supplement DMG

1.name: The Fool Upright +
1.comment: Earth allies' Spade Rank, Heart Rank, Diamond Rank, and Club Rank all rise by a random number (Can't be reactivated)

special_skill.name: Golden Twilight
special_skill.comment: Massive earth DMG to a foe / Caim's third skill resets to Blank Face / Raise a random suit rank on earth allies (Max: 4)
